title: desmanthus fallax
intro: Desmanthus fallax, also known as False Fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to East Asia. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Desmanthus fallax include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and aid in digestion. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in dried form for medicinal purposes, making it a valuable addition to natural health remedies.
